text: Code reviews are an essential part of software development. When a developer finishes writing a piece of code, a colleague carefully checks it before it is added to the project. This simple process is highly valuable. Firstly, it helps catch bugs early, before they become bigger problems later. A second pair of eyes can spot mistakes that the original writer missed. Secondly, code reviews promote knowledge sharing. Team members learn new techniques and understand different parts of the project. Finally, they improve overall team quality by encouraging consistent coding standards and collaboration. A team that reviews code regularly builds more reliable software and stronger developers.
